title: AeroBird
description:
AeroBird is a fast-paced acrobatic platformer where every jump matters. Leap across floating platforms, perform smooth backflips in mid-air, collect coins, and clear challenging obstacles without falling into the ocean.

Each level pushes your timing and precision further. Jump over barriers, control your rotation, land safely, and reach the finish line while collecting as many coins as possible.

The further you go, the harder the jumps become — with wider gaps, higher obstacles, and less room for mistakes.

 Features:

• Multiple challenging levels

• Obstacles, fences, and moving paths

• Collectible coins throughout each level

• Unlimited time to complete each level
description_short: AeroBird is a fast-paced acrobatic platformer where every jump matters.
